content: Mau nanya buat selektor gratis mending ambil apa ya bang?
Simpen aja, itu udah enak kok

Ada, 2x rate off baru rate on

Kalau doll itu bagus gak sih
Apa mending simpen silver

Lanjut gacha gk ya
Niat nya mau buat tim poison jg, tp posisi baru main tentacle
Bagus bagus aja, dia healnya lumayan + naikin strong atk, ngisi aliemus kenceng + ngasih aliemus ke semua awaker
Kalo udah exalt 10x dia bakal ngasih end of illusion card cost 0, ngasih fixed dmg 25% max hp
Enak mana sebenernya poison/tentacle+counter buat bossing yg hpnya gk ngotak
Lebih bagus lagi E3, terserah sih kalo mau lanjut
Kalo buat boss yang hp nya gede sih aku main dmg+bleed
Enak soalnya gelot, bleed nya bisa 40k lebih

G.ramona bagus kah bang di barengin m.doll? Blm tau skillnya soalnya

Transcending sight card, cost 2 : dapet 7 power + balikin kartu dari draw pile cost asli - 1, stack 3 balikin kartu dari draw/discard pile cost jadi 0

Sword of destiny, cost 3: dmg x3 power, stack 3 milih opsi : 1. dapet 3 arit. 2. double dmg & 3x key energy tapi kartunya ilang

Exalt : ganti posse yang dipunya

Enak banget
Skill yg cost 2 ambil kartu di deck ke tangan trus costnya dikurangin 1

Skill yg cost 3 cuma nge demeg.

Kalo pasifnya aktif
Yg cost 2 bisa add di dimana saja cost nya langsung 0

Yg cost 3 nambah materi cost atau mana player nya :v
Formasi gni enk kagak bang, apa ramona swap ke goliath/celestod?

Sanga nya ngeri juga ada dupe

Gamona tambah enak kalo udah kebuka overexalt
Semua awaker sama kebuka overexalt di E7
Cost aliemus nya double, nanti indikator nya merah
Nah utk gdoll ini ovetexalt bagus krn skill² smakin banyak alimus makin bagus juga eff nya
Keluar pas anniv dia, dapet free 1 dari login

Udh lama brrti nih game ya😅

Bukan, overexalt gdoll ngasih aliemus nya double, semua awaker poison, counter, base dmg +10%, sama kalo exalt dapet 2 stack end

Nambah shield dulu baru nge damage exalt dia

Buat reset awaker, jadi ada 2 opsi

1. training reset : reset englightment sama lvl (material balik semua)

2. black pool reset : Balikin semua material termasuk enlightmen sama waker ( jadi awakernya kekunci)
Nah nanti setiap reset itu dapet 1 selector tergantung awaker yang direset, semisal faros E3 di pake opsi 1 berarti dapet 3 selector
Sama kayak item pas awal main itu?
sedangkan faros E3 di opsi 2 black pool reset dapet 4 selector tapi faros nya kekunci, jadi tumbal
Horee ternyata cepet juga ya naikin e++ dari nge reset char lain
Tapi seinget ku dapetnya standard selector

Bisa sih tinggal ambil dari selector
Betul, ni uvash ku black pool reset wkwk jadi kekunci

Hard : Ultra (ungu), tidak rekomen buat early

Gw maen sampe chapter 1 kelar cuma pake karakter starter

Basic Rules:
your team contains 4 characters, each character has a "color". Now, Yellow faction could combined with other 3 color, team only 4 yellow faction perform yellow's feature.

yellow's feature help you not that easy to die, and accelerate you Ultimate Ability. blue's feature is some tentacle automatically attack the front enemy. Red's feature is a special card that could make character's Ultimate Ability change into different form, or just using like a consumables to accelerate your Ultimate Ability. Purple, the first card you play at each turn will be copy into a stack, if the cards in the stack is equal to 5, you earn a extra round, you could use those card you copy into the stack at that extra round.

each characters has a Ultimate Ability, when in a battle, related UI displayed on the left top. When 100 energy is enough, icons would be active. Play related [strike] or [defense] or some specific card could get Ultimate Ability energy.

your team has a KeySkill, need 1000 energy. related UI displayed on the left bottom. when you play a card that cost was not 0, you got cost*factor points energy.

your team has a Death Resistant, showing at the right top. three icons here were Death Resistant chance, enemy's total damage current round, round counter. When your HP less then 0 will judge if Death Resistant is trigger, if so, stay at 1 HP, and Death Resistant be half.

6.Basically, each turn you would draw 5 cards and have 5 cost point, and up to 10 cards in hand. you could change these by items during a quest.

Each characters could equip 2 Wheel of destiny . Covenant system was unlock after Lv.35 account, the second Wheel of destiny is release at Lv.15 account. These were important part of your build
